text:
Once upon a time there was an old cat who loved fish. Every evening he’d sail out onto the tiny pond nearby. His favorite thing was to gently throw the fish birds into the air. Their feathers would float down... and sometimes he’d catch them!

One day a huge owl swooped down. With a frightening scowl. Perhaps he’d lost dinner. Owling terribly.

Our cat friend had an idea. Why not throw some fish birds to the owl?

He took some feathers from a recent owl victim. That night he threw them up high.

Oh joy.

A bird took them.

He took more.

It was like fly-fowl day.

Even the owl, proud.

And they flew off into the moon.

That’s what you call an owlfest.

The cat sighed.

At least he liked fish…

Now that.

There’d be a story.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
